channel.title: Lateral Operations Blog
channel.description: Practical notes on international hiring, remote operations, customer success, sales support, and founder-led hiring systems.

item.title: Why Hiring International Talent Is an Operations Decision
item.description: International hiring works best when role clarity, communication rhythm, tools, and handoffs are designed before sourcing starts.

item.title: What a $750 Talent Sprint Actually Covers
item.description: A $750 Talent Sprint covers role intake, scorecard creation, focused sourcing, practical screening, and a concise shortlist for one remote role.

item.title: The Real Cost of Leaving a Critical Role Open
item.description: An open role creates operational drag through delayed responses, manager overload, missed follow-through, and quality problems.
